{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220621061CDE4C989CE59E903097"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618615208812233534","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"[你细品]就让我来给自由的艾伦第一个五星吧，虽然你时间线混乱，但抛开时间线，我觉得还是不错的，就是你既然要改变悲剧，就给我好好改变啊。时间线乱了也得给我好好改变！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773850238,"group_id":"7610734517979974680","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"相思本是无凭语，莫向花笺费泪行。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Atu923NRWcCRtgUPUlgX1oeaRnrzr6t91yFAlVkpo8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2647bbbb69d64eee819f45d4dd2839d2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702448&x-signature=ZeFOIVKK%2Fxwlf4tvp5gXMJdHm6M%3D","user_id":"2925118490678296","user_name":"荼荼要吃肉肉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2925118490678296","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610734517979974680","book_info":{"abstract":"【世界第一大剑豪】【最强三色霸气】【响雷】【多果实能力】【二舅的一生之敌】【鹰眼的追逐目标】【红发求而不得的男人】【革命军魅魔】……
顶着世界上最自由的名字，艾伦穿越海贼世界围观罗杰行刑，触发名场面打卡系统。
只需参与原著名场面或是影响到未来名场面的生成即可触发抽奖。
罗格镇打卡罗杰行刑，抽奖【罗杰剑术】
空岛暴揍艾尼路，成为空岛新神，抽奖【响雷】
风车村目睹红发断臂，抽奖【红发霸王色】
……
顶上战争，万国，和之国，蜂巢岛，艾尔巴夫……
一生转战三千里，一船曾当百万师！
待到王路飞出海后他才发现，这个世界上的每一个角落都有那个男人的传说！
而若干年后，当有人问起已经成为海贼王的路飞。
“你是这个世界上最自由的人吗？”
路飞只会无奈地摇了摇头。
“这个时代有一个新的名字，名为——”
“艾伦！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2eb49db01a7d526bf56a333c3c14dd24~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"裕龙乌图酋酋长","author_id":"","book_id":"7610734517979974680","book_name":"海贼：开局围观行刑打卡罗杰剑术","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610734571839029784","read_count":"22701","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"127457"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,系统,海贼,开局,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2eb49db01a7d526bf56a333c3c14dd24~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315666&x-signature=wjrizuO7M9TSQnUdVqtkSvB0epQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"316268403233885","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite
